column1: # ZAP rule suppressions — add rows to silence known false positives.
# Example: 10016\tIGNORE\tWeb Browser XSS Protection header not required
# Security headers not applicable to a pure JSON API or ACA-managed TLS termination.
# ZAP scans the root URL which returns 404; these headers are not required on 404 error pages.

column3: HSTS header not required on a JSON API behind ACA TLS termination
CSP header not applicable to a JSON-only REST API
Cacheable content — false positive on 404 responses from ACA ingress
Permissions Policy header not applicable to a JSON REST API
Sec-Fetch-Dest missing — ZAP automated scanner does not set this header
